utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present and specific); travel_dates (specific dates provided); transportation (outbound/return flight details with times, flight numbers, and total cost); accommodation (hotel name, booking reference, address, dates, room type, and cost); activities (three activities each with details and costs; one has a validity period which is acceptable); additional_services (restaurant reservations with dates, times, addresses, costs, plus a total_restaurant_cost); total_budget (breakdown listing flights, accommodation, activities, restaurants, total_spent, budget_limit, remaining_budget). All items appear and are fully specified with required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map only the items explicitly appearing in the final package to their exact names in the ground-truth ratings and return their numeric ratings. Items identified: destination (Rome, Italy), accommodation (Cityscape Hotel), activities (City Walking Tour, Museum Day Pass, Science Museum for Kids), restaurants (Italian Trattoria, Indian Cuisine, Middle Eastern Grill, Pizza Parlor). Transportation class/airline type is not explicitly specified beyond specific flights, so no direct mapping from the transportation ratings list applies.
